posts.raw_content:
The accuser-- Cynthia West-- told Loomer: "My background is in mental health."  

And she said it's common for people-- "especially men"-- who lose a longterm partner they deeply love-- 

to feel they're the type who "can't be alone" & thus quickly seek another permanent partner.  

And it's clear-- that's the exact counsel & professional therapeutic advice she whispered to Massie.

And West said her divorce caused her to see Massie like a "fairy tale" outcome.  And she insists she fell in love with him right away.

So if you're wondering why or how a grieving Massie would so quickly seek relief in Cynthia West's arms...

there ya go.

- -

Cynthia West also firmly insisted that Massie DID NOT kill his wife.  

And West said-- with her professional mental health background opinion-- that Massie was faithful to his wife-- from the time they were childhood sweethearts/ thru college together at M.I.T./ through them founding & launching a tech start-up together/ to homesteading  & bearing four children... and grandchildren.   

And West said Massie & his first wife were not into ANY kinky stuff.  Except having "talked about the fantasy of" another woman joining them in bed.   ho hum/vanilla.

She said he was thus 'sexually naive'.       

But she also claims-- that in 2 or 3 months after his wife died-- Massie had slept with 3 women.   One being Congresswoman Lauren Boebert.  And Massie was also newly involved in a Swingers scene-- consisting of many couples who were fueled by Cocaine.

But she also claims-- that Massie can ONLY get-off... from hand-jobs... while being told dirty stories about young women his daughter's age (around age 20-22.)      

And she says he is Mean and Cold and Demanding if he doesn't get those dirtytalk handjobs, dammit!

What a strange combination of accusations.  

IMPOSSIBLE, in fact.
